title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.885 - COL Elmer R Parrish memorial bridge designated for a bridge on Business Loop 44 in Pulaski County
text:
227.885.  COL Elmer R Parrish memorial bridge designated for a bridge on Business Loop 44 in Pulaski County. — The bridge on Business Loop 44 that crosses over Interstate 44 in Pulaski County shall be designated the "COL Elmer R Parrish Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by the department of transportation.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
